definition: Reusable schema-first curation workflow composed of code, schema, metadata, reports and documentation.
boundary_or_limitation: Can be adapted, audited and extended if assumptions are documented.

definition: One consenting self-tracking participant, 52 sessions, eight calendar days, heterogeneous devices and withheld source media.
role_in_article: Stress-test case for heterogeneity, not clinical evidence.
boundary_or_limitation: Not statistically generalisable and not a patient cohort.

definition: Curated wide/long tables and QC outputs.
role_in_article: Evidence of transformation and schema governance.
boundary_or_limitation: Granular timestamps and context may remain privacy-sensitive.

definition: withheld report files and source media recordings inside nested raw session archive.
role_in_article: Evidence that the pipeline can preserve raw-object boundaries.
boundary_or_limitation: Conditional, restricted or withheld release recommended unless manual review is documented.

definition: Code, documentation, manifests, reports and data layers.
boundary_or_limitation: Persistent public release can amplify residual privacy risk.
